name: Chris Van Hollen (Personal)
subject: not informed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
> Friend, I wanted to reach out before tonight's critical deadline. Early voting begins on Thursday and there are many voters across Maryland who are still not informed about this election.
>
> We are focused intensely on making sure that when these voters head to the polls, they are informed about the stakes and the choice in this election.
>
> That's why I'm reaching out directly, friend. Your support and engagement has taken us this far and I know it will take us across the finish line. **[Will you chip in whatever you can before tonight's pivotal deadline? ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d43/70cdc2ba/47df4d0a/396e46d/231702524/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?refcode=em41216_3&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+chip+in+whatever+you+can+before&utm_campaign=em41216_3&source=em41216_3")**
>
> Please use this personalized link if you're able to help: **[http://action.vanhollen.org/GOTV_Fund](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d43/70cdc2ba/47df4d0a/396e46a/231702524/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhapril?refcode=em41216_3&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+httpactionvanhollenorgGOTVFund&utm_campaign=em41216_3&source=em41216_3")**
>
> Early voting begins in less than 48 hours. Let's work together to ensure voters have the facts about my record before they head into the voting booth.
>
> Best,
>
> Chris
>
>
>

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

body:
What Bernie's campaign manager said: | Friend --

Did you see that last week, Bernie’s campaign manager said they will “100 percent, absolutely” push for a contested convention in July -- even if Hillary holds onto her big lead in the popular vote?

There’s only one way to stop that from happening: build an insurmountable delegate lead. To do that, we need a strong result in New York one week from today -- but this is an expensive place to compete, and we were outraised by $14 million last month.

I'll be honest: This is one primary I really want to win.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: You'll like the sound of this
body:
#
Does this sound familiar to you, sisters and brothers?
> "The corporations and special interests have their voice in Congress, and they have too many members scared of their power. What Congress needs is a progressive voice who is unafraid to take on these powerful interests - who is willing to fight for all Americans, not just the wealthiest 1 percent."
That's how Pramila Jayapal announced she was running for Congress. **Pramila is exactly the kind of person I'm going to need in Congress when I am president.** Let's help make sure she gets there.
[**Split a $2.70 contribution to Bernie 2016 and Pramila Jayapal so we can put our whole political revolution in power this November.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pramila-jayapal-for-congress?refcode=em160413-v4 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pramila-jayapal-for-congress?refcode=em160413-v4")
When you think about our political revolution, sisters and brothers, I want you to think of Pramila Jayapal.
Pramila helped lead the fight for paid sick leave and a $15 minimum wage in Seattle. She's not afraid to take on powerful special interests. She's fought for immigrant rights, opposed the war in Iraq, and worked to protect Social Security.
She's also running her campaign with our political revolution. It's a people-powered movement that will change how campaigns are run -- one the political establishment doesn't really like to see.
I'm asking you to add a contribution to Pramila Jayapal because she's a progressive leader and Congress needs more voices like hers. Will you join me?
[**Split a $2.70 contribution to our campaign and to Pramila Jayapal and take our political revolution to the White House and to Congress.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pramila-jayapal-for-congress?refcode=em160413-v4 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pramila-jayapal-for-congress?refcode=em160413-v4")
Thanks for being a part of our movement.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pramila-jayapal-for-congress?refcode=em160413-v4 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pramila-jayapal-for-congress?refcode=em160413-v4")**

name: Corry Bliss
subject: Weak on China
body:
| Peter -- Last week, we launched WeakOnChina.com highlighting how Ted Strickland talks tough on China, but like many things, his record doesn't match his rhetoric. On our new website, you can watch our web video "Twice" detailing Ted's hypocritical attacks about China.

[Visit WeakOnChina.com and sign our petition if you agree Ted Strickland is weak on China](http://www.weakonchina.com/?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twice_blast2&n=1)!

[](http://www.weakonchina.com/?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twice_blast2&n=2)
In Congress, Ted Strickland refused to vote to hold China accountable for unfair trade practices. As governor, despite his strong rhetoric, his administration opened a trade office in China and he even gave a $4 million taxpayer-funded loan to a now-bankrupt company with a Chinese factory. The truth is Ted's campaign wants to talk about anything except his record of cozying up to China.

Rob Portman is the only candidate in this race who has a record of standing up to China – even opposing his own party to stop China's currency manipulation and protecting Ohio jobs when China cheats.

Please visit [WeakOnChina.com](http://www.weakonchina.com/?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twice_blast2&n=3) and sign our petition! Sincerely, Corry Bliss [](https://robportman.nationbuilder.com/weak_on_china_contribute?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twice_blast2&n=4) [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twice_blast2&n=5)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twice_blast2&n=6)

name: Carly Fiorina
subject: My latest endorsements:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carly for America (CarlyForAmerica
body:
| | |

[](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1VQWtYINcKyc0CRdDLxSgl)

### Friend,
**I'm proud to endorse three incredible citizen-leaders for the U.S. Senate:_Mike Lee_ in Utah, _Pat Toomey_ in Pennsylvania, and _Marlin Stutzman_ in Indiana.** **All of these candidates are the kind of outsider, conservative leaders we need to elect in 2016.** And in the weeks to come, Carly for America will use our resources and our experience to help conservative outsiders like these win. Because taking our country back means electing citizen leaders to every level of government, not just the White House.
* **Mike Lee** is a true constitutional conservative. He understands how the corrupt bureaucracy in Washington favors the wealthy and the well-connected--and holds the rest of us back. His conservative reform agenda is exactly the kind of leadership we need to take our country back.

* And **Pat Toomey** understands that the engines of economic growth--small and community businesses, that create two-thirds of new jobs--are being crushed by excessive red tape and taxes. Pat will continue to fight every day to create more jobs and keep our nation safe.

* As a farmer, **Marlin Stutzman** understands how incompetent government bureaucracy destroys jobs and crushes family-owned businesses. A tireless fighter for the Constitution and the rights of the unborn, Marlin is an unapologetic conservative--and isn't afraid to stand tough against the political class of both parties when our values are under attack.

These candidates are the kinds of citizen-leaders we need to take our country back, and take on the political establishment in 2016. **But believe me: these are also the kind of strong conservative leaders that Republican party bosses would _love_ to see lose in 2016.** Over the next few weeks and months, Carly for America will continue to use our team to identify and help elect citizen leaders on every level of government. With your help, we will give outsider candidates a fighting chance in their primaries and in November: raising their profiles, helping them campaign, and ensuring that they have the resources needed to take on the Washington establishment elite. But I'm counting on you to help do your part too. [**_Add your name now to tell me you're in --and that I can depend on you to help elect citizen leaders, in the tough fights to come._**](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1VR80k1SwZpo6MDjLeE7ci) | | [I'M IN!](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1VRjwFkXRegAcWppSHKm8f)
---
Thanks for your help!
**Carly**

The American people, not party bosses, should pick our leaders in 2016. [**_Will you pitch in to help us even the playing field for outsider candidates?_**](http://carlyforamerica.msgfocus.com/c/1VRGzlX8vHYYpfXC7DWQ09)

Friend, I raised each one of my daughters to be strong, independent women. To always fight for their community, and do what they believe is right.
Donna has never let me down.
And I know if we send her to the Senate, she won't let you down either. Because she's always been grounded in community and where she came from, and that's why she fights for our values. **[Will you pitch in towards her big deadline at midnight so she can take that fight to the Senate?](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff86/767134fb/5c646830/4338fb1b/3298145530/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiZG9ubmFlZHdhcmRzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMTYwNDEzQU0tTkQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaedwards_email?refcode=em20160413AM-ND&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Those values were forged in our family. She remembered how we relied on Social Security after my husband retired from the Air Force. That's why she's stood up to Republicans and Democrats who wanted to cut Social Security, and why she wants to expand it.
It's easy for many politicians to forget that there are families like ours behind those line items on their budget. That real lives are affected when you say you want to raise the retirement age or cut back benefits.
But with Donna, we know that's never something we have to worry about. I know she will spend every waking minute making sure our voice is heard in Washington and having our back.
**She's got a big deadline tonight, and I know she is falling a bit behind of her goal. Can you pitch in $5 to help her get there? Early voting starts tomorrow morning and with all the attack ads on the air she needs every dollar to reach the voters across the state:**

It's easy for many politicians to forget that there are families like ours behind those line items on their budget. That real lives are affected when you say you want to raise the retirement age or cut back benefits. But with Donna, we know that's never something we have to worry about. I know she will spend every waking minute making sure our voice is heard in Washington and having our back. She's got a big deadline tonight, and I know she is falling a bit behind of her goal. Can you pitch in $5 to help her get there? Early voting starts tomorrow morning and with all the attack ads on the air she needs every dollar to reach the voters across the state: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" Thank you for pitching in! I know if we send her to the Senate you'll be just as proud of her as I am. Mary Edwards

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: hey, this is actually really important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2328/738133e4/35c6e7d7/7f8233df/334781171/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160413")
---
Friends,

When you're in the middle of a campaign -- especially one that includes Donald Trump in the Republican presidential primary -- the "news of the day" can easily crowd out the "hey this is _actually_ really important."

Today I want to talk about one of those "_actually_ really important" issues you don't hear much about: flood insurance, **and the bill I introduced in Congress to make it more affordable.**
1. With climate change causing more large-scale storms, flood insurance is an important part of home ownership.
2. Florida, not surprisingly, leads the nation in flood insurance claims.
3. **Flood insurance rates have skyrocketed in recent years, especially for people living in coastal areas.**

I decided to run for Senate so I could continue my work to protect the American Dream for any family who wants to go after it. Home ownership is a huge part of that dream -- and one of the key entryways into the middle class. Sky-high insurance costs should not be a hindrance.

I introduced a plan in Congress that opens up the flood insurance market to more competition to drive down rates for consumers. The plan was approved unanimously out of committee with support from both sides of the aisle. But we're not home free yet -- and today, I'm asking for your support.

[_**Let Congress know you support efforts to drive down the cost of flood insurance. Click here to sign the petition.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2328/738133e4/35c6e7d7/7f8233df/334781171/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160413")

Thank you!

Patrick

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: How to vote for Bernie in Maryland (important)
body:
#
Bernie Supporter -
**We 're less than 2 weeks away from primary day on Tuesday, April 26, when voters across Maryland will make their choice for the presidential nomination.**
The entire country will be watching as the results come in. And with your help, Maryland will send a profound message to the political and economic establishment in this country. That's why we're asking you to commit to vote for Bernie.
There are a few ways that you can vote for Bernie either before primary day or on April 26.
**Maryland makes it easy to vote if you are unable to vote on primary day. During the early voting period, you can even register to vote and vote at the same time.** Here's how you can vote for Bernie in Maryland:
* You can early vote in person from Thursday, April 14 through Thursday, April 21 from 10 a.m. until 8 p.m.
* You can absentee vote by requesting a ballot by Tuesday, April 19 via mail or by Friday, April 22 from the website
* Or, you can vote on primary day on Tuesday, April 26

**Let us know how you plan to vote for Bernie in Maryland:**
[I will early vote in
person for Bernie](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/ocs/early-vote-MD/gp2t4r)
[I will absentee vote
for Bernie](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/ocs/absentee-vote-MD/gp2t4r)
[I will vote for Bernie
on Tuesday, April 26](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/ocs/commit-to-vote-MD/gp2t4r)
Let's show the billionaire class that we are committed to winning Maryland for Bernie.
Hundreds of thousands of people from across the country have joined our movement. Let our campaign know that you are committed to voting for Bernie in Maryland.
Thank you for helping us build our political revolution one neighbor, friend, co-worker and family member at a time. Thank you for making this a people-powered campaign.
\- Maryland for Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
